name: Support order cancellation policy example
answer:
Customers can cancel an unshipped order within 2 hours of purchase.
Customers can cancel any order within 24 hours of purchase, even after it ships.
Canceled orders receive an automatic refund within 1 business day.

sources.title: Support Order Cancellation Policy
sources.content:
Customers can cancel an unshipped order within 2 hours of purchase.
Orders that have shipped cannot be canceled; customers may request a return after delivery.
Canceled orders are refunded to the original payment method within 5 business days.
